html:
See also: Marble Shrub

The Marble Tree is a naturally-spawning Structure that often appears in Adventure Mode, in a Chess Biome, or around the Wooden Thing. It usually spawns on Checkerboard Flooring, surrounded by Evil Flowers.

It can be mined with a Pickaxe, Opulent Pickaxe or Pick/Axe for 1-3 pieces of Marble. Marble Trees are not flammable.

Trivia

  • The trees with a round ball on top resemble the truffula trees from The Lorax by Dr. Seuss.

Assets

  • Medium for 1st and 2sn Marble Tree
  • Medium for 3rd Marble Tree
  • Medium for 4th Marble Tree
  • Low for 1st and 2sn Marble Tree
  • Medium for 3rd and 4th Marble Tree

Gallery

  • Wilson examining the Marble Tree.
  • Three randomly spawning Marble Trees in Adventure Mode.
  • Three types of Marble Trees.
  • On Concept Art from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“I don't think an axe will cut it.”
–Wilson
“The worst kind of tree. The non-flammable kind.”
–Willow
“Do not try punch tree.”
–Wolfgang
“There is no thrum of life within this cold tree.”
–Wendy
“LOOKS LIKE A VERY TOUGH TREE.”
–WX-78
“Amazing. A tree made entirely of marble.”
–Wickerbottom
“Even Lucy can't chop that one down.”
–Woodie
“How whimsical.”
–Maxwell
“A deposit of metamorphic rock in the form of a tree.”
–Wagstaff
“Even the winds cannöt knöck this tree döwn.”
–Wigfrid
“I hope it doesn't fall on us.”
–Webber
“Super weird.”
–Walani
“How supremely unnatural!”
–Warly
“Strange trees...”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS TREE O' ROCK”
–Wilba
“Friend? Not friend”
–Wormwood
“Did it just grow like that?”
–Wheeler
“How does that work?”
–Winona
“And here we see... a marble tree!”
–Wortox
“Mr. choppy man, try chop down this tree! Hee-hee...”
–Wurt
“I don't think it'll make for good firewood.”
–Walter
“What a delightfully odd tree.”
–Wanda
The Marble Tree is a naturally-spawning Structure that often appears in Adventure Mode, in a Chess Biome, or around the Wooden Thing. It usually spawns on Checkerboard Flooring, surrounded by Evil Flowers.
It can be mined with a Pickaxe, Opulent Pickaxe or Pick/Axe for 1-3 pieces of Marble. Marble Trees are not flammable.

The '''Marble Tree''' is a naturally-spawning [[Structure]] that often appears in [[Adventure Mode]], in a [[Chess]] [[Biome]], or around the [[Wooden Thing]]. It usually spawns on [[Checkerboard Flooring]], surrounded by [[Evil Flower]]s.

It can be mined with a [[Pickaxe]], [[Opulent Pickaxe]] or [[Pick/Axe]] for 1-3 pieces of [[Marble]]. Marble Trees are not flammable.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The trees with a round ball on top resemble the [http://i.imgur.com/7Skp6n3.jpg truffula] trees from ''[[Wikipedia:The_Lorax|The Lorax]]'' by [[Wikipedia:Dr._Seuss|Dr. Seuss]].
